category_sources: source_facts.description says it reattaches processes such as tmux to the background; official GitHub page describes Mac OS X pasteboard workarounds for tmux sessions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is reattach-to-user-namespace; source_facts.executables lists reattach-to-user-namespace.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions reattaching processes; source_facts.homepage identifies the tmux MacOSX pasteboard project context.
